title: Glass clip lock containers with Vent Small, Medium & Large Ideal For Picnics, Office Lunch and Storage Dishwasher, Microwave and Freezer
features: Brand new glass container set from Evokk
Pack comes with 3 containers small, medium & large
Approx. size of Small: 380ml, Medium: 620ml & Large: 1100ml
description: Product Description Fantastic Family Helper Allow you to better organize and storage your meals individually at home. Simply prepare your favorite meals once and store the leftovers. Save your time and relieve your stress of cooking different dinner every night. Great Office Assistant Allow you to bring meal and have lunch in office. Nothing is better than having a meal ready to go when you’re starving after a workout! Excellent Picnic Tool Allow you to have a picnic with your family and friends. Pack a full meal for long trips to countryside or easily control your daily intake when dieting. Freezer Safe Can be used for freezing in the refrigerator. Make your freezer more organized. Save your time and make your life much more convenient. Microwave Safe Can be used for warming in the microwave. The material makes it safely go straight from the refrigerator to the microwave or oven to the table. Save your time and make your life much more convenient. With Evokk Containers Enjoy home-cooked meal anytime and anywhere.
